scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE,FRONTEND' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run dev --workspace=user-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=score-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=web'
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run dev --workspace=user-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=auth-service' 'npm run dev --workspace=score-service'
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:services
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:packages && npm run build:services
scripts.clean:backend: npm run clean:packages && npm run clean:services
scripts.start:all: concurrently --names 'USER,AUTH,SCORE' --prefix-colors 'auto' 'npm run start:user' 'npm run start:auth' 'npm run start:score'
scripts.check-all: npm run lint:check && npm run type-check
scripts.postbuild: echo '✅ Build complete. All packages and services built.'
scripts.prod:test: npm run check-all && npm run build && npm run start:all
